specific_mechanism: Same body serves structure + storage; seasonal swell-shrink in response to environmental supply.
llm_application: BAOBAB: parameter memory pool elastically expands during off-peak by repurposing low-priority parameters via temporary low-rank approximation, absorbing context-overflow; restores parameters at peak. Storage uses the parameters themselves as buffer, not external pool.
novelty_claim: eLLM (2506.15155), dLLM-Serve (2512.17077), MemAscend (2505.23254) use external buffer pools or tier offload. BAOBAB uses parameter memory itself as elastic storage — temporary low-rank-collapse-rehydrate cycle is novel direction.
